description_long: This armchair features a plush, rounded seat and a wide, gently curved backrest, all upholstered in a rich, velvety blue fabric. The backrest is slightly flared and vertically paneled, providing both visual interest and ergonomic support. The seat is generously padded, offering a comfortable sitting experience, while the upholstery has a subtle, mottled texture that adds depth to the color. The armchair stands on four slender, tapered black legs, which elevate the seat and give the piece a modern, airy appearance. There are no visible armrests, and the overall silhouette is compact yet inviting, making it suitable for urban interiors or stylish public spaces. The design is contemporary, with a focus on comfort and visual appeal.
description: A modern, blue velvet-upholstered armchair with a rounded, flared backrest and slender black legs. The seat is plush and inviting, with a subtle mottled texture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved backrest with vertical paneling and the plush, rounded seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the gentle curve of the backrest and the seamless transition to the seat, as well as the slender black legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous backrest surface and the subtle seam running vertically down the center.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the curved backrest, plush seat, and the modern leg design.
attribute_backrest_style: wide, rounded, flared, vertically paneled, medium height
